web_results.title: 2028 Democratic Presidential Power Rankings: The Ballad of Jasmine Chokeitt
web_results.description: It was only when she actually entered the race that things started to go wrong. With only a few weeks left to go before the actual primary, practically none of Crockett’s strength as a representative of the Democratic Party has transferred into strength as an actual candidate.

web_results.title: Jasmine Crockett up by double digits in Texas Senate Democratic primary poll
web_results.description: While the congresswoman outpaces Talarico on favorability — with 71 percent of Democratic voters viewing Crockett favorably and 59 percent viewing Talarico favorably — more than a third of Democratic respondents say they don’t know of or have strong feelings about Talarico.

web_results.title: r/Defeat_Project_2025 on Reddit: As of now, I think Jasmine Crockett has the best chance of winning in 2028 if we start now.
web_results.description: I don’t have any suggestions for a promising democratic nominee in 2028 yet. I hope with every atom of my being someone surfaces, though. ... Chris Murphy and Wes Moore are some good candidates that have the “fight” in them. ... I agree. I don't think running a woman in 2028 is going to work. Which is so stupid. Honestly, I'd love Jamie Raskin to run. He's pretty amazing. ... Yeah. He's got similar politics to folks like Crockett (plus you could see him smirking when she cussed out MTG).

news_results.title: Jasmine Crockett leads James Talarico by double digits in Senate Democratic primary, poll finds – Houston Public Media
news_results.description: On the Republican side, Ken Paxton and John Cornyn were neck-and-neck and in position for a runoff, according to the poll from the University of Texas’ Texas Politics Project.
